name: Multiverse Mishap
description:
The year is 2014. Tony, Clint, Thor, Steve, and Natasha are all in the Avengers lounge doing their own things, and chatting. Loki stands off to the side doing final tweaks on a new spell, and just as he starts to cast it to test it, Thor loudly interrupts him. Startled, the spell goes awry, opening a portal in the ceiling that connects below your feet in your universe.

You can be from the universe of your choice, a super, a mundane, or something more. Get creative. Don’t forget to use prompts to tweak the story.

Optimized tokens (Nov 2)

I’ve chatted with it a bit, and it seems to be holding pretty steady. If any issues arise, let me know through the email at the top of this page.

Switched to just using names to make prompting easier.
creator: HikikomoriHime
